initiatives.name: Hundred Hands Collective
initiatives.description: Grassroots collective in Manchester, NH. Building community & fostering skill sharing with our neighbors. Mutual aid & liberation.

initiatives.name: Black Lives Matter Manchester
initiatives.description: to dismantle anti-Blackness, eradicate systemic racism, champion racial equality, combat racial injustices, put an end to police brutality, and advocate for justice for all Black lives in New Hampshire.

initiatives.name: Southern NH For Palestine
initiatives.description: Building the movement for Palestinian Freedom in So. NH.

initiatives.name: Southern New Hampshire DSA
initiatives.description: The Southern New Hampshire chapter of the Democratic Socialists of America (SNH DSA) is a multi-issue activist group working locally to expand the possibilities of democracy in New Hampshire and push for shared ownership of power and resources.
